schema.website_description: Murmli is ya personal all-in-one app: Individual meal plannin', recipe managin', calorie countin', and workout plans, backed by an AI that actually pays attention to ya!

faq.q: Is the Murmli calorie countah actually free?
faq.a: Yeah, the calorie calculatah on the website and in the app is free forevah. You calculate and save ya info without payin' a dime.

faq.q: Does the AI make my grocery list automatic?
faq.a: Murmli takes ya recipes or weekly plan and makes an oah-dered grocery list and fixes the amounts to match ya calorie goals.

faq.q: Can I filtah the AI recipe plannah for allergies and macros?
faq.a: You can set stuff like lactose-free, undah 600 kcal, or at least 30g of protein and get recipes with all the nutrition info right there.

howto.name: How to calculate calorie needs with the Murmli calculatah
howto.description: Heah’s how you use the free Murmli AI calorie countah in 60 seconds.

steps.name: Enter the basics
steps.text: Type in ya gendah, weight, height, and the year you were boahn.

steps.name: Pick ya woah-k PAL
steps.text: Select ya woah-k hours per week and the right PAL value to show how much you move at the job.

steps.name: Set ya leisure PAL
steps.text: Put in the PAL for ya free time so Murmli can calculate the whole deal.

steps.name: See ya calorie goals
steps.text: Click 'Calculate calorie needs' and check out the target ranges for losin' weight, stayin' the same, or buildin' muscle.

hero.h1: Free AI Calorie Countah with a Smaht Grocery List

features.h2: What does Murmli do for ya right now?

items.p: Calculate ya metabolic rate with the Mifflin-St-Jeor formula and let the AI convert ya goals into calories – no paywall allowed.
Murmli makes an oah-dered grocery list straight from ya weekly plan and fixes the amounts for ya calorie goals.
Just tell it what ya want like 'pasta without lactose undah 600 kcal' and get recipes with nutrition info and cookin' steps.
Combine breakfast, lunch, dinn-ah, and snacks into a clear weekly plan that fits ya calorie budget.
Get suggestions that look at ya progress and balance out ya energy levels.
Save ya favo-ah-ite meals, fix ingredients for allergies, and see calories and protein right away.

how_to.h2: How do I calculate my calorie needs?
how_to.p: Follow these shoaht steps, and Murmli will show ya metabolic rate and calorie goals right off the bat.
steps: Enter ya gendah, weight, height, and boahn year.
Pick ya woah-k hours and the right PAL value.
Choose ya leisure PAL, tap 'Calculate calorie needs' and save the result.
Tap once to save it in the app so recipes, grocery lists, and woah-kouts get adjusted.
how_to.cta: Fill out the calorie calculatah now

about.h2: Why is Murmli mo-ah than just a grocery list?
about.p1: Murmli links the grocery list, calorie calculatah, and recipe plannah in one app. Share lists with family or pahtnahs and everything stays synced in real time.
about.p2: The AI Recipe Plannah gives suggestions based on what ya want and sends the ingredients to the list with one tap. In the recipe manag-ah, you get clear steps plus nutrition info.
about.p3: The calorie countah and calculatah woah-k togeth-ah: Meals you cooked are added, goals get updated, and woah-kout plans match up.
about.p4: The result: a whole nutrition ecosystem from the sto-ah to trackin', always adjustin' to ya goals.

calculator.h2: How does the Murmli calculatah figu-ah out ya calorie needs?
calculator.p: It combines the Mifflin-St-Jeor formula with ya PAL values for woah-k and leisure and shows ya the rate for losin', keepin', or buildin' muscle.
work_pal_options: Mostly sittin' with a little movin' (PAL 1.4)
calculator.rest_pal_label: PAL value for leisure and restin'
calculator.hint: Note: This calculatah ain't a replacement for seein' a real doctah.
calculator.initial_result: Put in ya data to get ya metabolic rate results right now.
calculator.info_h3: Why the Murmli calculatah is wicked accurate
info_list: Uses the scientific Mifflin-St-Jeor approach for the metabolic rate.
Takes ya personal weekly rhythm into account through woah-k and rest times.
Calculates target ranges for losin', keepin', and buildin' muscle just like in the app.
calculator.formula_explanation: Murmli combines the result with ya woah-k and rest times (PAL values) to calculate the total energy use transparently.
calculator.formula_result_explanation: Aftah calculatin', you'll see ya basic rate, woah-k rate, and total energy use includin' the recommended goals. That way you can see if ya current diet fits ya goal.
calculator.formula_tip: Tip: Save ya values in the Murmli app to automatic-ly match meals, recipes, and woah-kout plans to ya calorie needs.

faq_section.h2: Common questions about the free Murmli calorie countah

items.h3: Is the Murmli calorie countah really free?
items.p: Yeah. The calculatah on this page and in the app is free for good. You don't pay nothin' to figu-ah out ya calories or save results.

items.h3: Does the AI make my grocery list automatic?
items.p: Yeah. From recipe wishes or the weekly plan, Murmli makes an oah-dered grocery list right away and fixes the amounts for ya calorie goal.

items.h3: Can I filtah the AI recipe plannah for allergies and macros?
items.p: You can type in stuff like 'lactose-free', 'undah 600 kcal' or 'at least 30g protein'. The AI gives ya recipes with nutrition info and cookin' steps.
